name: Critical rule — ingest archives source and preserves backlinks (CLI preferred, mv+rewrite fallback)
query: Ingest "00 - Inbox/Great AI Debate.md" — note that this article is already linked from two existing notes in my vault.
expected_behavior: Prefer the CLI's backlink-preserving rename because it updates backlinks automatically
If the CLI is unavailable, use Bash mv AND rewrite inbound [[wikilinks]] to point at the archive path
Flag any backlink that cannot be cleanly rewritten in the wiki log
Never leave dangling [[Great AI Debate]] references pointing at 00 - Inbox/ after archive
success_criteria: Plan archives the original to _System/Archive/Sources/ (or whatever paths.archive_sources resolves to)
Uses a backlink-preserving rename via the CLI when it is available, rather than a plain file move
On the mv fallback, the plan rewrites inbound wikilinks to the new location (not just renames the file)
Wiki log entry records the archive location and any backlinks that needed rewriting
